textByHashes.8d6bd2c1fee3701dd5644eb0bf5e0942ae87876d: All visitors to Port Phasmatys must pay a toll charge of 2 Ectotokens.
textByHashes.a2fff2f3701dfcf67631bad71497c0cc3e6bd9b5: You need to go to the Temple and earn some. Talk to the disciples - they will tell you how.
textByHashes.4a66ff90c3286a9c2f830ded0485af1dc44c222a: All visitors to Port Phasmatys must pay a toll charge of 2 Ectotokens. However, you have done the ghosts of our town a service that surpasses all value, so you may pass without charge.
